title: Expanded IEG ARG gene-set x 8-disorder battery
model: MAGMA_Z ~ in_set + log10(gene_length) + lof_pLI + log10(exp_lof+1) + log10(NSNPS+1)

brief_contract.decision_rule: q_SCZ < 0.05 -> IEG_ENRICHED; q_SCZ in [0.05, 0.20) -> IEG_SUGGESTIVE; q_SCZ > 0.20 -> IEG_NULL; IBD/Height q<0.05 with beta>0.30 -> IEG_GENERIC_CONFOUND
